gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T3.id = T1.gender_id WHERE T1.race_id = 21 AND T1.gender_id = 1
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero s JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id WHERE s.race_id = 21 AND g.id = 1;
question: Among the superheroes with the race of god/eternal, how many of them are male
